description: Auto-extracted from category, comparison, and best-of pages by extract-claims.mjs. Manual editorial fields (rationale, source_chain, etc.) are preserved across runs.

source_chain.finding: Cursor leads for integrated IDE; Claude Code leads for agentic CLI; Copilot leads on price

coding_claude_code_ranked_2.subject: claude-code
coding_claude_code_ranked_2.rationale: Best for power users; agentic CLI at $100-200/mo

coding_copilot_ranked_3.subject: github-copilot
coding_copilot_ranked_3.rationale: Budget option at $10/mo; easiest to adopt

video_kling_ranked_1.subject: kling
video_kling_ranked_1.rationale: Best quality-to-price ratio at $10/mo; 1080p, strong physics

video_runway_best_pro.subject: runway
video_runway_best_pro.rationale: Advanced camera controls, 4K upscale, style consistency

automation_n8n_ranked_1.subject: n8n
automation_n8n_ranked_1.rationale: Visual + code flexibility + native AI agent nodes + self-host free

seo_surfer_ranked_1.subject: surfer-seo
seo_surfer_ranked_1.rationale: Best for content optimization — real-time scoring, NLP term suggestions

seo_semrush_best_suite.subject: semrush
seo_semrush_best_suite.rationale: Most comprehensive — keyword research + backlinks + audits + content

seo_ahrefs_best_budget.subject: ahrefs
seo_ahrefs_best_budget.rationale: Lowest entry price at $29/mo with largest backlink index

voice_elevenlabs_leader.subject: elevenlabs
voice_elevenlabs_leader.rationale: Quality leader for voice cloning and synthesis

meta.how_to_extend: Each time a new 'Best Of', comparison, or category ranking is written, add the relational claim(s) here with its depends_on. The staleness reporter uses depends_on to cascade re-verification triggers.
meta.re_verify_triggers: See claim-types.yml signal_catalog for full list
meta.when_to_use_challenges_withstood: Increment after a Mode C adversarial round where a human rejected the challenge in favor of keeping the claim. This is the primary signal that a claim is battle-tested.
